page: Microsoft Azure NG32adms_V620_v1 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the NGADSV620v1 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor, paired with 176.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 5.5 GB of RAM per core.

This server configuration includes a single integrated V620 GPU equipped with 30 GB of dedicated VRAM. Storage capabilities consist of 4889 GB of local disk space, and the instance is premium storage capable, allowing for high-throughput storage configurations.

The combination of dedicated AMD CPU cores, a 30 GB GPU, and substantial local storage provides a dense resource profile for memory-intensive and graphics-accelerated workloads. The lack of complimentary public IPv4 addresses requires external networking configuration. This hardware profile is suited for memory-intensive database hosting, virtual desktop infrastructure, 3D rendering, and GPU-accelerated data processing tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure NG32adms_V620_v1 is an x86_64 server from the NGADSV620v1 family, running on Microsoft Hyper-V. It features 32 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 176.0 GB of system memory, and a single V620 GPU with 30 GB of VRAM. For storage, the instance is equipped with 4889 GB of local disk and supports Premium Storage. This resource-dense configuration is designed for memory-intensive and GPU-accelerated workloads. The high ratio of memory per core combined with substantial local storage and dedicated GPU resources makes this server suitable for demanding database operations, data analytics, 3D rendering, and virtual desktop infrastructure.
